_comment: Hand-edited caps + non-Claude spend for the Arsenal gauges. Keyed by model id (see MODELS in app.js). serve.cjs /api/arsenal serves this live. Claude (opus/sonnet/haiku) `spent` is OVERWRITTEN with REAL 5h-window output tokens parsed from ~/.claude/projects logs — only their `quota`/`unit` here are honored (set your real plan caps). For minimax/glm etc, edit spent+quota by hand.
